# My NixOS Configuration

I recently started learning NixOS and this is my first configuration with it. In this configuration I'm using:
- Nix Flakes
- Home Manager
- Unstable channel

I've split it up so I can have different configurations for each device, currently I only have a 'desktop' configuration. 

The current window manager I'm using with this is Sway, but my configuration allows me to easily add other ones if I feel like it.

Although I'm new to Nix I'm trying to follow best practices (majorly inspired by Vimjoyer on YouTube). By chance I also started learning the Vim and Tmux workflow properly. Most of this system is configured on the TTY. I find that the focused environemt of the TTY has something special to it - I'll probably never return to VSCode and the like to be honest. I'm too deep in, I've tasted the efficiency, the only thing holding me back are the good 'ol skill issues. I'm sure it will sort itself out in due time.

Well, if you're starting with Nix too good luck, it's challenging, but rewarding and fricking awesome so please... **Join Us** *cough* well, goodbye now. I've yapped enough.
